name: 5dim_energy
title: 5Dim's mod - Energy
author: 5Dim
description:
Energy module for 5Dim's mod
Expands power generation and distribution options
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of steam engines
- 10 tiers of boilers
- 10 tiers of solar panels
- 10 tiers of accumulators
- 10 tiers of medium electric poles
- 10 tiers of big electric poles
- 10 tiers of substations
- 10 tiers of lamps
